title: Senior Software Engineer - Syntel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Syntel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
